SEARCH
Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory

Class InventoryBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.inventory.InventoryBuilder
public abstract class InventoryBuilder extends Object
A builder class that manages an inventory GUI. This class is responsible for creating and updating inventories with buttons and event handling, including locking interactions based on the specified InventoryBuilder.LockMode.

The InventoryBuilder class allows customization of the inventory layout, adding buttons, handling clicks, and setting lock modes to control interaction with the inventory.

    static enum 
    InventoryBuilder.LockMode
    Enumeration that defines different lock modes for the inventory interaction.

  • Constructor Details

    • InventoryBuilder

      public InventoryBuilder()
      Constructs an instance of the InventoryBuilder.

      This constructor is used to create an InventoryBuilder object, which can then be customized by setting the title, lock mode, and adding buttons to build a dynamic inventory.

  • Method Details

    • getInventoryView

      public org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryView getInventoryView()
      Gets the inventory associated with this builder.
      Returns:
      The top inventory associated with the current inventory view.

    • setMenuType

      public void setMenuType(org.bukkit.inventory.MenuType menuType)
      Sets the menu type (size/layout) of the inventory.
      Parameters:
      menuType - The MenuType to be set for the inventory.

    • getMenuType

      public org.bukkit.inventory.MenuType getMenuType()
      Gets the menu type (size/layout) of the inventory.
      Returns:
      The current MenuType.

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Sets the title of the inventory.
      Parameters:
      title - The title to be set for the inventory.

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Gets the title of the inventory.
      Returns:
      The current title of the inventory.

    • setLockMode

      public void setLockMode(InventoryBuilder.LockMode lockMode)
      Sets the lock mode of the inventory.
      Parameters:
      lockMode - The lock mode to be set.

    • getLockMode

      public InventoryBuilder.LockMode getLockMode()
      Gets the current lock mode of the inventory.
      Returns:
      The current lock mode.

    • addButton

      public void addButton(int slot, InventoryButton button)
      Adds a button to the inventory at the specified slot.
      Parameters:
      slot - The slot index where the button should be placed.
      button - The InventoryButton to be added.

    • getButtonMap

      public Map<Integer,InventoryButton> getButtonMap()
      Gets a map of all buttons added to this inventory builder.
      Returns:
      A map of buttons associated with their slot positions.

    • decorate

      public void decorate(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Decorates the inventory view by setting the icons of all buttons. This method creates the inventory and assigns the icons for each button.
      Parameters:
      player - The player for whom the inventory is being decorated.

    • updateButton

      public void updateButton(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, int slot, InventoryButton button)
      Updates the button at the specified slot and re-decorates the inventory.
      Parameters:
      player - The player for whom the button should be updated.
      slot - The slot index of the button to update.
      button - The new InventoryButton to replace the old button.

    • updateButtons

      public void updateButtons(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, Map<Integer,InventoryButton> buttons)
      Updates multiple buttons at once and re-decorates the inventory.
      Parameters:
      player - The player for whom the buttons should be updated.
      buttons - A map of buttons to be updated, where the key is the slot index.

    • onClick

      public void onClick(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent event)
      Handles the InventoryClickEvent for this inventory. This method checks the lock mode and cancels the event if necessary.
      Parameters:
      event - The InventoryClickEvent to handle.

    • onOpen

      public void onOpen(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryOpenEvent event)
      Handles the InventoryOpenEvent for this inventory. This method decorates the inventory for the player when it is opened.
      Parameters:
      event - The InventoryOpenEvent to handle.

    • onClose

      public void onClose(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryCloseEvent event)
      Handles the InventoryCloseEvent for this inventory. This method can be used to clean up when the inventory is closed.
      Parameters:
      event - The InventoryCloseEvent to handle.
